query:interval_mass.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested total count as an integer
query:interval_mass.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0,y0,x1,y1] boxes around the histogram bars included in the total

query:rank_item_bin_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the x-axis value containing the requested item rank, as an integer
query:rank_item_bin_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x0,y0,x1,y1] box around the answer histogram bar
